Why Join Sanskriti?

More than a marketplace. An ecosystem.

Everything a seller needs. Under one roof.

A complete platform that transforms artisans and entrepreneurs into thriving digital-first businesses.

We serve 25+ product categories with over 1 lakh products — handling every step from brand creation to your first sale.

Start Your Journey →See All Services
🛍️

E-Commerce Setup

Amazon, Flipkart & website setup — account to first order, completely managed.

✦

Branding

Logo, brand kit, packaging, Amazon storefront — your identity, built premium.

🏭

Manufacturing Setup

Factory setup, machinery, QC systems, and workforce — all under one program.

📦

Inventory Management

Zero-error stock control for 1 lakh+ SKUs with our proprietary system.

📸

Photoshoot

Studio & lifestyle photography. Amazon-compliant. Catalogue-ready.

🎬

Instagram Videos

Scroll-stopping reels and brand films that drive genuine product discovery.

📊

Business Consultancy

Pricing, margins, scaling — from practitioners who've built real businesses.

🎓

Training Programs

Master e-commerce from scratch or scale what you already have. 25+ courses.

Seller Dashboard

Everything you need,in one place.

Track your orders, manage your wallet, download GST invoices, and access training videos — all from a single powerful seller dashboard.

Built for Indian sellers. Compliant, simple, and always up to date.

Get Your Dashboard →Sign In
💰
Wallet & Payouts
Add funds, track balance, request payouts — all in real time.
📦
Order Management
View, track, and manage every order with full status history.
🧾
GST Invoices
Auto-generated, compliant GST invoices for every transaction.
🎬
Training Videos
Unlock expert courses on Amazon, branding, and operations.
🏺
Product Gallery
Browse and order from 1L+ products across 25+ categories.
👤
KYC & Profile
Complete your KYC verification and manage your business details.
